## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Apideck team and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, combining agency-quality service with software scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K strategy sprint (6-8 weeks), then $15K/month for 12 months (daily publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Apideck seeking to expand content production (10-15 articles/month) and refresh existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [GrowthX's process: Strategy sprint → AI workflows → Expert editing → Publishing (minimal client involvement)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Scale AI) after success with AI content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Combines agency-quality service, AI speed, and software scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Focus on capitalizing on shift to AI search (expected to surpass traditional search by 2028)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Clients include technical companies like DeepGram, SearchAI, AugmentCode, Udemy, Okta](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### GrowthX Process

  - [Strategy sprint (6-8 weeks): Deep research, expert interviews, artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Growth execution: AI-powered content creation workflows with expert editing](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [Minimal ongoing client involvement after initial strategy phase](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Daily publishing as standard output (can be scaled up)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

### Platform Demo

  - [Showed example workflows for Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Demonstrated multi-step process: brief creation, research, outlining, drafting, fact-checking, cross-linking, SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Highlighted ability for experts to refine AI-generated content at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Pricing and Commitment

  - [$20K for strategy sprint (6-8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [$15K/month for 12 months (minimum commitment)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Flexible payment terms (typically annual, but open to discussion)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2327.0)
  - [No trial period due to extensive onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2109.0)

### Results and Examples

  - [Showed traffic growth for clients like Ramp (2x organic traffic in a year) and Tiro (10x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Demonstrated content appearing in Google and AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Offered to send B2B SaaS content examples post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send B2B SaaS content examples to Kate and Saurabh](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)
  - [Apideck team to discuss internally and with Gertjan next week](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [Decision timeline: aiming for end of August](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)
  - [If proceeding, prompt communication needed due to GrowthX's 4-6 week kickoff backlog](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with Marcel (CEO) or Kyle (VP Customer Growth) if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ysYxKjAGwZBzy9uzUvRMztkRHSZxFmH9?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
